title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology presents findings from research on AI-driven zero-day vulnerability detection, explaining how AI uncovers security exploits faster than traditional methods and discussing impacts on cybersecurity risk and defense strategies. The content argues that AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps practices could improve system safety.
writeup: IBM Technology presents research on AI-driven zero-day vulnerability detection, showing how AI surfaces security exploits faster than traditional scanning methods. The video weighs the cybersecurity implications: faster discovery raises risk if attackers gain the capability, and it strengthens defense when paired with proactive scanning. The core argument is that AI-driven vulnerability scanning integrated into DevSecOps practices could improve overall system safety.
